description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light natural wood finish and four wide, white-faced drawers stacked vertically on the right side. The left side features a tall, single door that opens to reveal three spacious interior shelves. The cabinet's clean lines and minimalist design make it suitable for urban environments such as apartments, offices, or garages. The top surface is flat and can be used to support or display additional items. The drawers and door are slightly ajar, showing the interior storage capacity and construction. The cabinet stands directly on the floor with no visible legs or base elevation.
description: A light wood cabinet with four white drawers and a tall side door revealing shelves, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing four open drawers on the right and a tall open door on the left, revealing interior shelves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the open drawers, and the open door extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, uninterrupted wood back panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cabinet's side panel and the open door extending toward the viewer.
